tasks.title: Create docker-compose.integration.yml
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose.integration.yml exists in the root folder
Contains timescale/timescaledb:latest-pg16 and ingestion-api service definitions
Uses distinct networks and runs isolated from host port 5432
tasks.description: Create an isolated docker compose environment for integration and schema testing

tasks.title: Implement curl-based smoke test loop
acceptance_criteria: A script or command successfully performs a health check loop
Retries up to 10 times with delay on connection-refused
Fails fast with exit code 1 if health check does not return HTTP 200/OK
tasks.description: Create the automated smoke test script to verify API/database readiness

tasks.title: Implement E2E flow test
acceptance_criteria: Posts deployment and incident events to live API, waits for worker dequeue, runs compute/metrics.py, and asserts snapshot outputs match expected 2025 DORA tier schemas
tasks.description: Develop the end-to-end integration and computation validation test

tasks.title: Update GHA ci-tests.yml workflow with isolated jobs
acceptance_criteria: .github/workflows/ci-tests.yml is updated with sequential integration, smoke, and e2e jobs
Dumps container logs to integration.log on failure and uploads them as GHA artifacts
Cleans up all Docker networks, volumes, and containers on complete
tasks.description: Configure the GitHub Actions testing runner to execute the multi-tier test pipelines

tasks.title: Validate GHA ci-pipeline.yml Orchestration
acceptance_criteria: All stages (Stage 0 through Stage 4) resolve cleanly in the correct order
tasks.description: Ensure the overall orchestrator correctly executes and gates on the new test runner jobs

tasks.title: Pre-commit compliance validation
acceptance_criteria: All created and modified files pass 13/13 pre-commit checks locally and in CI
tasks.description: Verify code quality, formatting, and secret scanning on all newly introduced code
